entity.name: Naomi Aro
entity.description: Creator and maintainer of waveform-playlist, a multitrack Web Audio editor and player with canvas waveform visualizations.

projects.name: waveform-playlist
projects.description: Multitrack Web Audio editor and player with HTML canvas waveform visualizations. Used in audio research, listening test platforms, podcasting tools, and music production workflows. Features include drag-and-drop, trimming, splitting, audio effects, recording, and variable-tempo support. Built as a modular monorepo of 11 packages with React components and Web Components, designed to be embedded in larger applications.

plans.name: One-time donation
plans.description: Support waveform-playlist development with a one-time contribution of any amount.

plans.name: Monthly sponsorship
plans.description: Recurring monthly support for ongoing development and maintenance.
